title: pseudabutilon spicatum
intro: Pseudabutilon spicatum, also known as the Devil's Back, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pseudabutilon spicatum include its ability to treat fever, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by boiling the leaves and stems in water to create a decoction, which can be used to treat various health issues.
